## Problem

What user workflow cannot be expressed cleanly today?

## Proposed Syntax

```gwdk

```

## Semantics

What does the compiler own, and what remains in normal Go?

## Diagnostics

What unsupported or invalid cases should fail loudly?

## Non-Goals

What should this proposal avoid?

## Tests And Examples

What parser, formatter, diagnostic, IR, generation, docs, and example coverage
would be required?
